inputs.label: Annual Tuition & Fees
inputs.businessContext: Average annual cost of college including tuition, fees, and materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average annual cost of college including tuition, fees, and materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üniversitenin ortalama yıllık maliyeti (harç, ücret ve malzemeler dahil)
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche jährliche College-Kosten einschließlich Studiengebühren, Gebühren und Materialien.

inputs.label: Alternative Salary Without College
inputs.businessContext: Estimated annual salary if not attending college, assumed constant over working years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated annual salary if not attending college, assumed constant over working years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üniversiteye gitmemesi durumunda tahmini yıllık maaş (çalışma yılları boyunca sabit kabul edilir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätztes Jahresgehalt ohne College-Besuch, angenommen konstant über die Arbeitsjahre.

inputs.label: Starting Salary After College
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual salary in the first year after graduation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual salary in the first year after graduation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mezuniyetten sonraki ilk yılda beklenen yıllık maaş
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartetes Jahresgehalt im ersten Jahr nach dem Abschluss.

inputs.label: Annual Salary Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual percentage increase in college graduate salary.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual percentage increase in college graduate salary.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üniversite mezunu maaşında beklenen yıllık yüzde artış
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter jährlicher prozentualer Anstieg des College-Absolventengehalts.

inputs.label: Working Years After College
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years working after graduation until retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years working after graduation until retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mezuniyetten emekliliğe kadar beklenen çalışma yılı sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl von Jahren nach dem Abschluss bis zur Rente.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual rate used to discount future cash flows to present value (opportunity cost of capital).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual rate used to discount future cash flows to present value (opportunity cost of capital).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını bugünkü değere indirgemek için kullanılan yıllık oran (sermaye fırsat maliyeti)
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Diskontierungssatz zur Abzinsung zukünftiger Zahlungsströme auf den Barwert (Opportunitätskosten des Kapitals).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
